channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter in road, 19th April
item.description:
Edge of road full of litter. Has not had a weekly cleanse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harmony Place, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall near bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti tags on fence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thornham Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti on gate just before bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black jacket/sleeping cover/ear amplifiers dumped off footpath, 19th April
item.description:
Park at end of Princes Plain, walk up right hand side of path beside house fence and just before metal barrier. On the R/H side of path in the hedge gap there are the items, black jacket/black cover with white lining and set of music ear piece. Can you please clean away, Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken lawnmower dumped, 19th April
item.description:
Lawnmower in several parts dumped on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Southey Street, Penge, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped office chair, 19th April
item.description:
Someone dumped an office chair in the street and it was being moved up and down the street and had now ended up in the bin area of 16 Kenninghall Road E5 8BY. It's too big to go in the residential bins. No idea who dumped it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish on pavement in Woodstock Cres N9, 19th April
item.description:
Bag of rubbish has been dumped on pavement in Woodstock Cres N9 opposite no.100
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayfield Crescent, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned, parked badly making it diffucult for emergancy services to get through efficiently, 19th April
item.description:
It's been here for days, no MOT since Dec 25 Ambulance was on the road yesterday and struggled to get past it. Could be critical to someone needing urgent care!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Knoll, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two boxes of Nitrous Oxide gas canisters dumped by wooden posts, 19th April
item.description:
Sunday morning Again nitrous Oxide gas canisters are dumped at this spot at the start of the footpath from Princes Plain between TLC and House No 130 Princes Plain. Can you please collect ASAP, near schools and a busy school run, looks to be about 12 canisters in total. (See previous refs 9261950 & 9279390). Someone is using this area to dump canisters after illegal usage of gas.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince's Plain, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish on the street, 19th April
item.description:
Household rubbish on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped into front garden, 19th April
item.description:
Bathroom shelving dumped on pavement outside my house no. 9 . Recent work on pavement by bt or council workermen has resulted in the item being moved into my front garden as pictured please could it be removed. Else a long trip to beckenham required by me for someone else's rubbish ! Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Transmere Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clear water leak since one year, 19th April
item.description:
Clear water has been leaking since a year yet nothing has been done by the authorities. The leak is located near the pavement next to the Busy bees nursery (n12 8tp) on woodside lane before the turn into woodside avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12c, Woodside Lane, Woodside Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking narrow pavement, 19th April
item.description:
Lime bike blocking narrow pavement forcing local mobility scooter user on to the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sanford Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking narrow pavwmwnt, 19th April
item.description:
Lime bike blocking narrow pavement - local resident using mobility scooter forced on to the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clevedon Close, West Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: BT Manhole Collapsing, 19th April
item.description:
The BT manholes on the south side of the circus look like they are collapsing. I suspect a large / heavy vehicle have driven over.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grate not filled with gravel properly causing trip hazard, 19th April
item.description:
Grate with gravel not filled properly causing trip hazard especially as lights not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turners Meadow Way, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
Ford hill Road by Lnapdale Road Remove graffiti from Bus time table bosrd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Fordmill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Speeding Bikes in Newington Gardens, 19th April
item.description:
Please fit a entrance restriction on the Newington Gardens entrance adjacent to the children's playground in order to deter speeding of courier and lime bikes using the park as cut through to the Harper Rad Mosque and food delivery from Mercato Metropolitan to The Rising Sun on Harper Road. The park is no longer safe to walk in due to speeding bikes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tiverton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside the school, 19th April
item.description:
Fly tipping outside the school and outside several properties
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Finland Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
